heading: Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
label: 561 to 568 Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
notes: Section 561, , , related to apprehension. See , Armed Forces.act May 5, 1950, ch. 169, § 164 Stat. 111section 807 of Title 10
Section 562, , , provided for apprehension of deserters. See .act May 5, 1950, ch. 169, § 164 Stat. 111section 808 of Title 10
Section 563, , , related to imposition of restraint. See .act May 5, 1950, ch. 169, § 164 Stat. 111section 809 of Title 10
Section 564, , , related to restraint of persons charged with offenses. See .act May 5, 1950, ch. 169, § 164 Stat. 111section 810 of Title 10
Section 565, , , provided for reports and receiving of prisoners. See .act May 5, 1950, ch. 169, § 164 Stat. 112section 811 of Title 10
Section 566, , , prohibited confinement of members of armed forces with enemy prisoners. See .act May 5, 1950, ch. 169, § 164 Stat. 112section 812 of Title 10
Section 567, , , prohibited punishment before trial. See .act May 5, 1950, ch. 169, § 164 Stat. 112section 813 of Title 10
Section 568, , , related to delivery of offenders to civil authorities. See .act May 5, 1950, ch. 169, § 164 Stat. 112section 814 of Title 10
Effective Date of RepealRepeal effective , see footnote, .Jan. 1, 1957act Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 680
